name: SharePoint Integration
description: Microsoft 365 SharePoint integration: tenant config, drive registration, manual delta sync (Phase 1); webhook records handoff (Phase 2); federated search + M365 connector feed (Phase 3). One-way: SharePoint -> AtoM ingest.
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd
features: Microsoft Graph delta query sync (manual + scheduled)
Records handoff via existing IngestCommitService pipeline (Phase 2)
Purview retention label -> AtoM disposition mapping (Phase 2)
Encrypted client_secret storage via framework EncryptionService

phases.1: Foundation - auth, drive registration, manual sync
phases.2: Webhooks - records handoff, retention mapping (gated on Purview spike)
phases.3: Discovery - federated search + M365 connector feed

changelog.0.1.0: Initial Phase 1 scaffold - schema, configuration, service stubs

portability.note: Schema and feature set must mirror the Heratio Laravel package exactly. See atom-extensions-catalog/docs/technical/ahgSharePointPlugin_Implementation_Plan.md section 19.
